task: Implement fetchEarthquakes() with USGS feed URL constant, error handling, normalized record shape.
verification_notes: S1.A1: USGS_FEED_URL constant equals the past-day endpoint.
S1.A2/S1.A3: normalizeFeature returns objects with id/magnitude/place/timeMs/lat/lon/depth in the documented types.
S1.A4: try/catch around fetch returns { ok:false, error:{code:'network', message} }; non-2xx returns code:'http'; bad JSON or missing features returns code:'parse'. No throws escape.
S1.A5: the URL appears exactly once as a named const; no other string literal duplicates it.
IP3.A1: no client-side filter; every feature is mapped to a record.
